statement: Embedded Google Docs/file preview — Version-level Drive/Docs links should be previewable inside the Builder using the shared popup shell, so users can reference approved docs without leaving the canvas. — Attempt to render the document via iframe/embed where supported, inside the shared sticky popup shell. If embedding fails (permissions, link format, browser restrictions), show a fallback to open externally. Rules: do not store file content, do not parse file content as product data in MVP, do not mutate Builder data from preview, Google Drive permissions remain outside the app.
affected_modules: file preview component; shared popup shell; Drive link handling
ux_impact: Reference docs without leaving the Builder.
